title: sambucus racemosa var. major
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. major, also known as the American elderberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. Its medicinal properties include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of American elderberry include relief from flu and cold symptoms, as well as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. American elderberry can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to use the berries in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
